homepage.text_excerpt: Emily Darlington MP – Championing a Fairer, Greener, and Brighter Future for Milton Keynes Central Emily Darlington MP Championing a Fairer, Greener, and Brighter Future for Milton Keynes Central About Emily How Is Emily Working for you? Weekly Newsletter News & Views Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results Useful Resources Contact Emily Surgery Appointments Data Protection and Privacy Policy Welcome YOUR MILTON KEYNES CENTRAL MP Contact Emily My Activity emily4mk 811 2,511 Member of Parliament for Milton Keynes Central 🌹 All queries, casework and invitations should be sent to Emily.darlington.MP@parliament.uk emily4mk View Instagram post by emily4mk Apr 30 Open post by emily4mk with ID 18119625280631417 It was lovely to attend the Guide Dogs reception in Parliament to learn more about the role that guide dogs play in the lives of young people with visual impairment. Many young people are not getting the support they need to confidently navigate life with a visual impairment and Guide Dogs are determined to change this by fighting for early support. It was also International Guide Dogs Day yesterday – a day to celebrate the fantastic work these dogs do! 🐶 #miltonkeynes #guidedogs … 0 0 emily4mk View Instagram post by emily4mk Apr 30 Open post by emily4mk with ID 18091454126588193 It’s not every day that you get the opportunity to try your hand at some pottery in between Parliamentary business! Fun fact: pottery is my favourite way to unwind after a long week in Parliament 🏺 … 6 0 emily4mk View Instagram post by emily4mk Apr 30 Open post by emily4mk with ID 17887603194481773 I was so glad to see so many MPs attend the Charity Shop pop-up that I hosted with Willen Hospice in Parliament! It was a great opportunity to talk about the fantastic work that Willen Hospice do and discuss how integral palliative care is. I look forward to seeing my colleagues wearing their incredible stock in the Chamber and around the Houses of Parliament – #sustainablystylish … 7 1 emily4mk View Instagram post by emily4mk Apr 30 Open post by emily4mk with ID 17879507670588598 Happy #LoveMK Day! ❤️ As your MP everyday is #LoveMK Day and I couldn’t be more grateful for that 🏙️ What are you doing to celebrate today? #miltonkeynes … 14 1 emily4mk View Instagram post by emily4mk Apr 28 Open post by emily4mk with ID 18173389015407309 For victim-survivors, waiting for your chance to have your voice heard in court can be unbearably retraumatising. This government’s committed to making sure there is swift justice for victims of alleged rape and sexual violence, and so it’s absolutely imperative that if the Romanian court process isn’t proceeding, the CPS must be allowed to proceed at pace with its 21 charges against the Tate brothers. https://www.dailymail.com/news/article-15771851/Starmer-new-calls-extradite-Andrew-Tate-Romania-courts.html … 14 1 emily4mk View Instagram post by emily4mk Apr 28 Open post by emily4mk with ID 18005691515872213 Willen Lake, Loughton Valley Park, Waterhall Park, Caldecotte Lake, Campell Park – the list goes on! We are so lucky to have so many green spaces in our city some which are looked after by the Council and many by the amazing Parks Trust – they are places for families, exercise, social events, celebrations and so much more. We should have so much pride in our green spaces – what park or lake in Milton Keynes is your favourite? #miltonkeynes #greenspaces #lovemk #mkshorts … 18 1 emily4mk View Instagram post by emily4mk Apr 28 Open post by emily4mk with ID 18390163855089614 Great news! Milton Keynes College is getting £1 million in funding from the Government to support refurbishment and repair works. MK College has played a role in the educational journeys of so many across this city, giving them access to opportunities, learning and training. pages.title: About Emily – Emily Darlington MP
pages.meta_description: Emily was born at St Thomas’ Hospital in London and raised in Quebec, Canada, where she graduated from Concordia University in 1996 with a BA in Political Science. Before entering Parliament, Emily made a significant impact in local government. Elected to Milton Keynes City Council in 2018, she represented Bletchley East and went on to…
pages.text_excerpt: About Emily – Emily Darlington MP Emily Darlington MP Championing a Fairer, Greener, and Brighter Future for Milton Keynes Central About Emily How Is Emily Working for you? Weekly Newsletter News & Views Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results Useful Resources Contact Emily Surgery Appointments Data Protection and Privacy Policy About Emily Emily was born at St Thomas’ Hospital in London and raised in Quebec, Canada, where she graduated from Concordia University in 1996 with a BA in Political Science. Before entering Parliament, Emily made a significant impact in local government. Elected to Milton Keynes City Council in 2018, she represented Bletchley East and went on to serve as Deputy Leader and Cabinet Member for Adults, Housing, and Healthy Communities. In that role, she led transformative estate regeneration projects, championed improved end-of-life care, and played a key role in making Milton Keynes a White Ribbon City – standing up to male violence against women and girls. She also spent time volunteering and serving on the board of a Kenyan charity focused on tackling poverty – deepening her passion for social justice and global equity. Now as the MP for Milton Keynes Central, Emily brings that same drive to Westminster. She continues to fight for safer communities, affordable housing, and stronger public health services. Whether on the council or in Parliament, Emily has always focused on the issues that matter most to people’s everyday lives – standing up for those too often overlooked and working to build a fairer future for all. Stay in the loop! headings: h2: Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results
pages.text_excerpt: Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results – Emily Darlington MP Emily Darlington MP Championing a Fairer, Greener, and Brighter Future for Milton Keynes Central About Emily How Is Emily Working for you? Weekly Newsletter News & Views Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results Useful Resources Contact Emily Surgery Appointments Data Protection and Privacy Policy Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results As part of my ongoing online safety campaign, I carried out a survey of 14-16 year olds in schools across Milton Keynes Central to hear directly from young people about their experiences online. It explores how social media and digital platforms affect them, what they feel works (and doesn’t) when it comes to online safety, and what changes they believe the government should consider. The survey also examined young people’s views on potential restrictions or bans, to understand the level of support and concern around these ideas. Below, I’ve linked the survey results, which reflect the voices, experiences, and opinions shared by participants. If you have any questions about this campaign or would like to discuss the survey findings, please contact my office. Stay in the loop! headings: h2: What is a constituency surgery?
pages.text_excerpt: Surgery Appointments – Emily Darlington MP Emily Darlington MP Championing a Fairer, Greener, and Brighter Future for Milton Keynes Central About Emily How Is Emily Working for you? Weekly Newsletter News & Views Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results Useful Resources Contact Emily Surgery Appointments Data Protection and Privacy Policy Surgery Appointments What is a constituency surgery? A constituency surgery is a series of one-to-one meetings that a Member of Parliament (MP) has with their constituents. This gives constituents the opportunity to make appointments to meet with them to discuss issues affecting them, issues they care about or problems they are facing. I hold an appointment only constituency surgery on the first Saturday of every month. I’m here to offer assistance on a range of issues such as housing, healthcare, welfare benefits and asylum and immigration. Please get in touch by filling out a contact form here , or by emailing your name, address and a brief summary of your case to emily.darlington.mp@parliament.uk. My team will get in touch with you as soon as they can to book you an appointment. Please note that appointments are booked on a first come first serve basis. Stay in the loop! Facebook X Instagram TikTok YouTube Bluesky LinkedIn Email: emily.darlington.mp@parliament.uk Office Phone: 07748808468 Subscribe Subscribe to get my the latest updates in your inbox.
